gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor smiles brightly, gestures widely toward the colorful blocks on the screen, and turns to engage the learners
a person steps closer, opens both hands and mimics counting with fingers while encouraging the class to join in
a tutor points to two separate groups of blocks, clearly indicating the three and two blocks as they speak
a person gently brings both hands together, indicating the combination of the two groups while explaining the task
a tutor leans forward slightly, encouragingly raises both arms upward, and invites students to count the new group
a person tilts their head thoughtfully and uses one hand to gesture a questioning motion, prompting students to think
a tutor claps hands together joyfully, nods with enthusiasm while congratulating the students on their addition effort
a person gestures with both hands, illustrating the concept of total as they reinforce the meaning of adding groups
